summary: Iteration 8: Verified all new features - 5-step wizard for admin Generator, simple-generate fix for admin with client_id, new serp/analyze-full endpoint, Configuration page with only 3 tabs. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login returns token and role=admin
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid credentials return 401
Backend: POST /api/articles/simple-generate with client_id for admin - NO longer returns 400 (BUG FIXED)
Backend: POST /api/articles/simple-generate without client_id for admin returns proper 400 error
Backend: POST /api/serp/analyze-full - Returns competitors array with position, url, title, headings, description
Backend: POST /api/serp/analyze-full - Returns extracted object with titles and headings arrays
Backend: POST /api/serp/analyze-full - Empty keyword returns 400
Backend: POST /api/serp/search - Still works correctly
Backend: GET /api/clients - Returns list of clients
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id} - Returns specific client
Backend: GET /api/activity-logs - Returns all activity logs (admin)
Backend: GET /api/activity-logs/{client_id} - Returns client-specific logs
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview - Returns admin stats
Frontend: Login page works with admin@seoengine.it / admin123
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (1 client, 5 articles, 4 published)
Frontend: Generator page has 5 sequential steps: Strategia, Analisi SERP, Dati GSC, Prompt, Genera
Frontend: Step 1 (Strategia) shows ContentStrategyTab with Funnel Stage, Obiettivo, Buyer Persona, etc.
Frontend: Step 2 (Analisi SERP) has keyword input and analyze button - shows competitor data with headings
Frontend: Step 3 (Dati GSC) available for GSC data loading
Frontend: Step 4 (Prompt) shows textarea for advanced prompt (auto-generated from SERP data)
Frontend: Step 5 (Genera) has toggle: Articolo Singolo / SEO Programmatica
Frontend: Articolo Singolo mode has form with titolo, keywords, obiettivo + genera button
Frontend: SEO Programmatica mode has keywords input (servizi, citta, tipi) + combinazioni preview
Frontend: Configuration page (/clients/{id}/config) has ONLY 3 tabs: API Keys, Knowledge Base, Tono & Stile
Frontend: Activity Log page works - shows 26 operations, success/running statuses, filters
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified: 1) POST /api/articles/simple-generate now accepts client_id for admin (was returning 400 before), 2) New POST /api/serp/analyze-full endpoint returns full competitor analysis with titles and headings, 3) Generator page redesigned as 5-step wizard for admin (Strategia→Analisi SERP→Dati GSC→Prompt→Genera), 4) Step 5 has toggle between Articolo Singolo and SEO Programmatica modes, 5) Configuration page simplified to 3 tabs only (API Keys, Knowledge Base, Tono & Stile). Activity Log page shows 26 operations with success/running status. SERP analysis uses DuckDuckGo and returns real competitor data.

simple_generate_fix.status: FIXED - Admin can now use simple-generate with client_id
simple_generate_fix.change: Added client_id support for admin users (line 276-279 in articles.py)

returns.competitors: array with position, url, title, headings, description, text_preview

steps: 1-Strategia: Funnel Stage, Obiettivo, Buyer Persona, CTA, Modello Copywriting
2-Analisi SERP: Keyword input, competitor analysis with extracted headings
3-Dati GSC: GSC data loading (optional if connected)
4-Prompt: Auto-generated prompt based on SERP/GSC data
